Hero.headline: Automate your
Hero.subheadline: We replace Excel and manual workflows with custom software solutions designed for scale.

Problem.title: The hidden cost of
Problem.subtitle: Every hour your team spends moving data manually is an hour they aren't growing your business.
Problem.card1Desc: Copy-pasting data across systems leads to expensive mistakes and lost revenue.
Problem.card2Desc: Entering the same information in Excel, CRM, and accounting software wastes hours.
Problem.card3Desc: Bottlenecks in approval workflows and manual report generation slow down growth.
Problem.card4Desc: Unable to see real-time metrics because data is scattered across multiple spreadsheets.

Solution.title: Everything you need to
Solution.subtitle: We don't just build software. We engineer automated workflows that eliminate human error and dramatically reduce operating costs.
Solution.sol1Desc: Tailor-made web applications that fit your exact business workflows perfectly, not standard templates.
Solution.sol2Desc: We connect APIs and automate repetitive tasks across your tools using modern architectures.
Solution.sol3Desc: Get instant visibility into your entire operation with unified data metrics all in one place.
Solution.sol4Desc: We integrate directly with ERPs, CRMs, WhatsApp, and Stripe for seamless business continuity.

Dashboard.title: See your business,
Dashboard.subtitle: Our custom dashboards give you real-time visibility into all your operations without touching a single spreadsheet.

CTA.title: Stop wasting time with
CTA.subtitle: Transform your business operations in weeks, not months. Join the companies that have already scaled with reactIVE.
CTA.disclaimer: No pressure. Just a conversation about your business bottlenecks.

Footer.tagline: Custom software engineering to automate your business processes and replace manual workflows.
